heading: Audit of financial transactions
label: 1795h Audit of financial transactions
text: The Comptroller General of the United States shall audit the Central Liquidity Facility under such rules and regulations as the Comptroller may prescribe.
notes: Codificationredesignated subch. III as title III of , cited as a credit to this section.Section 309(b)(1) of Pub. L. 96–221act June 26, 1934, ch. 750
